purpose: Published when a learning path is assigned to a learner or target scope so enrollment orchestration can activate it.

consumers.usage: Creates/updates learner enrollments and assignment lifecycle state.
Dispatches assignment and due-date notifications to learners/managers.
Bootstraps learner path snapshots and expected completion timelines.
Measures assignment coverage and audience targeting effectiveness.
Forwards assignment events to external HRIS/LXP systems when configured.
Retains assignment evidence for policy and compliance audits.
